seo.landingTitle: Smengo - Smart Shift Scheduling Software for Teams of 15–300
seo.landingDescription: Replace Excel with a smart shift planner. See your team's entire month at a glance: who's working, vacations, sick days, coverage conflicts. Telegram notifications, PDF export, role-based access. 14 days free, no credit card.
seo.ogLandingTitle: Smengo - Smart Shift Scheduling for Teams
seo.ogLandingDescription: Your team's whole month on one screen. Telegram alerts, projects, PDF export. 14 days free.
seo.pricingTitle: Smengo Pricing - Plans for Shift Scheduling Software
seo.pricingDescription: Transparent pricing: Start free for teams up to 10, Team $29, Business $79 per month. 14 days full access, no card required. Unlimited employees, exports, Telegram notifications.
seo.ogPricingDescription: Start free / Team $29 / Business $79. 14-day free trial, no card.

pain.title: Sound familiar?
pain.item1: Your manager sends an updated Excel file in chat - nobody knows if it's the latest version
pain.item2: Coverage gaps show up at the last minute, not a week before
pain.item3: To find out who's working Saturday, you have to call or message someone

whyConnected.title: When everything's in one place, shifts run smoothly
whyConnected.subtitle: Smengo brings scheduling, team, and tasks to one screen - so you plan faster, close coverage gaps, and stop losing people in chats.
whyConnected.old1: Schedule in spreadsheets, chats in messengers, time-off on paper
whyConnected.old2: Every shift change means manual work and a hundred messages
whyConnected.old3: Decisions made too late, when it's already on fire
whyConnected.new1: Schedule, departments, time - all in one window
whyConnected.new3: Forecast ahead - make calm, proactive decisions
whyConnected.newImgAlt: Smengo interface: schedule and team in one place

features.title:
Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.
features.subtitle: Smengo shows the whole month at once: employees as rows, days as columns.
features.f1Desc: One screen shows your entire team's schedule for the full month. No scrolling, no pivot tables.
features.f2Desc: Group employees by team. Filter instantly to focus on just the department you need right now.
features.f3Desc: Set a minimum headcount per department. Smengo flags any day that falls short - quietly, not alarmingly.
features.f4Desc: Define your own shift types with labels, colors, and a "counts as present" toggle - in any language.
features.f5Desc: Full support for Russian, Ukrainian, and English. Set a company default; each user can override their own.
features.f6Desc: Managers see their team. Owners see everything. No accidental edits from the wrong person.

testimonials.title: What teams say
testimonials.q1: Used to spend 2 hours making the schedule, now it takes 15 minutes. And conflicts are visible ahead of time.
testimonials.q1Author: Anna, HR manager, retail chain of 80 people
testimonials.q2: Finally stopped working through a shared Excel file. Now everyone sees their own department.

faq.title: Common questions.
faq.q1: Do I need a credit card to start?
faq.a1: No. The 14-day trial requires no payment information whatsoever. You only enter billing details if you decide to upgrade after the trial ends.
faq.q2: Can I import my team from Excel?
faq.a2: Yes - import employees via CSV. Direct Excel integration is on the roadmap for later this year.
faq.a3: The full interface is available in Russian, Ukrainian, and English. Set a company-wide default, and each user can override their own preference from their profile.
faq.a4: Plans are billed monthly or annually (annual saves 20%). Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel any time from the Billing page. All payments are processed securely via Paddle.
faq.a5: Absolutely. Upgrade or downgrade any time - changes take effect immediately, and any unused time is prorated.

whyus.title:
Built for managers
who hate spreadsheets.
whyus.sub: Every feature is here because a real ops manager asked for it.
whyus.i1Desc: Every employee, every day - no tabs, no scrolling. Full picture in seconds.
whyus.i2Desc: Auto-flag days when a department falls below minimum headcount - before the shift starts.
whyus.i3Desc: Click a cell to assign a shift. Drag across a range to fill a whole week instantly.
whyus.i4Desc: Owners see everything. Managers see only their teams. No accidental edits by the wrong person.
whyus.i5Desc: Name your shifts, pick colors, mark what counts as present. Works in any language.
whyus.i6Desc: One click to export - ready to print, share in chat, or attach to an email.
whyus.i7Desc: Fill and analyze schedules with an AI assistant that learns your team's patterns.
whyus.i8Desc: Staff mark themselves present via Telegram bot or the web app - no phone calls needed.
whyus.i9Desc: Full access from day one. Enter billing details only if you choose to upgrade.
whyus.i10Desc: Connect your tools, scripts, or bots. Build on top of Smengo with a documented REST API.

pricing.title: One schedule costs less than one missed shift
pricing.subtitle: 14 days free on any plan. No credit card.
pricing.ctaSubtitle: 14 days free on any plan. No card needed.
pricing.faq1q: Do I need a credit card for the trial?
pricing.faq1a: No. 14 days of full access without a card. After that, choose a plan or stay on limited read-only access.
pricing.faq2q: Can I change my plan later?
pricing.faq2a: Yes, anytime from the Billing section. Upgrades are prorated; downgrades take effect next cycle.
pricing.faq3q: What happens to my data if I cancel?
pricing.faq3a: Your data is kept. You switch to read-only mode - you can export schedules at any time.
pricing.faq4a: For teams over 300 people, contact us and we'll work out custom terms.
pricing.planStartDesc: For small teams just getting started
pricing.planTeamDesc: For growing teams that need coverage and alerts
pricing.planBusinessDesc: For larger operations with multiple departments and roles
pricing.socialProof: Trusted by teams in restaurants, clinics, retail and IT
pricing.socialProofStat: 400+ teams already plan shifts with Smengo
pricing.enterpriseDesc: For companies with 300+ employees – custom terms, SSO and a dedicated manager
